resultList.dtldesc: Embark on a journey of modern living with our exclusive 3 BHK Flat for sale in the newly constructed Vitthal Shivalay, Chandkheda, Ahmedabad. This meticulously designed residence, Vaastu compliant and facing East, offers a harmonious blend of contemporary comfort and positive energy, promising a serene haven for you and your family.Property Specifications Spanning a substantial super built-up area of 200 sq yards, this unfurnished residence awaits your personal touch to transform it into the home of your dreams. Located on the 9th floor of a meticulously designed 9-storeyed building, this flat promises panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. The spacious interior unfolds into three bedrooms, with two attached bathrooms and one common bathroom-all designed in a modern Western style and equipped with geysers for your comfort. A balcony, attached to the master bedroom, provides a serene retreat, offering views of the open space, garden, and the bustling main road.The living cum dining area is a versatile space, ideal for entertaining guests and fostering family togetherness. Additional features include a store room for added convenience. The regular kitchen comes complete with a platform and sink, and the piped gas connection ensures a seamless cooking experience. The utility area attached to the kitchen further enhances the practicality of this space. Vitrified flooring throughout the flat adds a touch of elegance to every corner.Facilities Your comfort and convenience are our top priorities. The covered parking facility ensures the safety and accessibility of your vehicles. A dual water supply system, from both borewell and corporation sources, guarantees uninterrupted water availability. The 100 power backup facility, along with the presence of security guards and CCTV installations, adds an extra layer of security to the premises. Multiple lifts within the building ensure easy vertical mobility. Enjoy a host of amenities within the complex, including a clubhouse, gym, and indoor game facilities, providing opportunities for recreation and fitness at your doorstep.Locality Situated near the NY Cinema, this residence is surrounded by educational institutions and healthcare facilities within a 1 km radius. Malls, supermarkets, banks, ATMs, and public transport options are conveniently accessible, making daily life a breeze. The railway station is a mere 4 km away, ensuring easy connectivity for your travel needs. Additionally, a proposed metro station in the vicinity enhances the future connectivity of this prime location.
